languages.text: Бой был долгим. Люди сопротивлялись до последнего, изнемогая в схватке с невероятно могущественным врагом. Ценой собственных жизней бойцы справились с передовым отрядом, но чужакам, выходящим из коридоров, не было числа. Наследни{mf|к|ца} скомандовал{mf||а} отступление, и саперы обрушили проход за нами с помощью мельта-зарядов, чтобы задержать противника и выиграть время для отхода.

The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.
languages.original_text: Бой был долгим. Люди сопротивлялись до последнего, изнемогая в схватке с невероятно могущественным врагом. Ценой собственных жизней бойцы справились с передовым отрядом, но чужакам, выходящим из коридоров, не было числа. Наследни{mf|к|ца} скомандовал{mf||а} отступление, и саперы обрушили проход за нами с помощью мельта-зарядов, чтобы задержать противника и выиграть время для отхода.

traits.locale_text: The battle was long. The people fought to the last, gruelled by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

The battle was long. The people fought to the last, gruelled by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

languages.text: La batalla fue larga y brutal. Los humanos lucharon hasta el fin, agotados por el increíble poder del enemigo. Al precio de sus vidas, los soldados acabaron con la vanguardia, pero un sinfín de xenos salían de los pasillos. Mi hereder{mf|o|a} ordenó una retirada y los zapadores hundieron el pasillo detrás de nosotros con cargas de fusión para retrasar al enemigo y ganar tiempo.
languages.original_text: The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

traits.locale_text: La batalla fue larga y brutal. Los humanos lucharon hasta el fin, agotados por el increíble poder del enemigo. Al precio de sus vidas, los soldados acabaron con la vanguardia, pero un sinfín de xenos salían de los pasillos. Mi hereder{mf|o|a} ordenó una retirada y los zapadores hundieron el pasillo detrás de nosotros con cargas de fusión para retrasar al enemigo y ganar tiempo.

languages.text: Le combat sembla durer une éternité. Les humains se battirent avec l'énergie du désespoir, face à des forces ennemies en surnombre. Au prix de leur vie, les soldats repoussèrent l'avant-garde, mais voyant d'innombrables autres xénos continuer d'affluer des couloirs, mon {mf|héritier|héritière} ordonna la retraite, et les sapeurs firent s'effondrer le passage derrière nous à l'aide de charges à fusion pour retenir l'ennemi et nous permettre de gagner du temps.
languages.original_text: The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

traits.locale_text: Le combat sembla durer une éternité. Les humains se battirent avec l'énergie du désespoir, face à des forces ennemies en surnombre. Au prix de leur vie, les soldats repoussèrent l'avant-garde, mais voyant d'innombrables autres xénos continuer d'affluer des couloirs, mon {mf|héritier|héritière} ordonna la retraite, et les sapeurs firent s'effondrer le passage derrière nous à l'aide de charges à fusion pour retenir l'ennemi et nous permettre de gagner du temps.

languages.text: 战斗持续了很久。敌方力量惊人。人类一方逐渐不敌，却仍战至最后一人。士兵们拼死击退了先锋，但更多的异形仍从走廊深处涌出。我的继承人下令撤退。工兵安放热熔炸弹，炸塌通道阻挡敌人，替我们争取时间。
languages.original_text: The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

traits.locale_text: 战斗持续了很久。敌方力量惊人。人类一方逐渐不敌，却仍战至最后一人。士兵们拼死击退了先锋，但更多的异形仍从走廊深处涌出。我的继承人下令撤退。工兵安放热熔炸弹，炸塌通道阻挡敌人，替我们争取时间。

languages.text: Die Schlacht war lang. Die Menschen kämpften bis zuletzt, wurden aber von der unglaublichen Macht des Feindes aufgerieben. Die Soldaten opferten im Kampf mit der Vorhut ihr Leben, aber aus den Korridoren ergoss sich ein endloser Strom von Xenos. {mf|Mein Erbe|Mein Erbin} ordnete den Rückzug an, und die Pioniere sprengten den Gang hinter uns mit Melterladungen, um den Feind aufzuhalten und uns Zeit zu verschaffen.
languages.original_text: The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

traits.locale_text: Die Schlacht war lang. Die Menschen kämpften bis zuletzt, wurden aber von der unglaublichen Macht des Feindes aufgerieben. Die Soldaten opferten im Kampf mit der Vorhut ihr Leben, aber aus den Korridoren ergoss sich ein endloser Strom von Xenos. {mf|Mein Erbe|Mein Erbin} ordnete den Rückzug an, und die Pioniere sprengten den Gang hinter uns mit Melterladungen, um den Feind aufzuhalten und uns Zeit zu verschaffen.

languages.text: Savaş uzun sürdü. Düşmanın inanılmaz gücü yüzünden bitkin düşmüş olsalar da insanlar sonuna kadar savaştı. Askerler, canları pahasına öncü birliklerle başa çıktı ama koridorlardan sayısız zeno geliyordu. Vârisim geri çekilme emri verdi, istihkâmcılar düşmanı durdurmak ve bize zaman kazandırmak için arkamızdaki geçidi melta patlayıcılarıyla çökertti.
languages.original_text: The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

traits.locale_text: Savaş uzun sürdü. Düşmanın inanılmaz gücü yüzünden bitkin düşmüş olsalar da insanlar sonuna kadar savaştı. Askerler, canları pahasına öncü birliklerle başa çıktı ama koridorlardan sayısız zeno geliyordu. Vârisim geri çekilme emri verdi, istihkâmcılar düşmanı durdurmak ve bize zaman kazandırmak için arkamızdaki geçidi melta patlayıcılarıyla çökertti.

languages.text: 長い戦いの末、人間たちは敵の圧倒的な力に疲弊しながらも最後まで戦い続けた。命を賭して先鋒を倒した兵士たちだったが、通路から次々と現れる異星人の数に圧倒された。私の後継者は撤退を命じ、爆薬で通路を塞ぎ、敵の進撃を遅らせ、時間稼ぎをした。
languages.original_text: The battle was long. The humans fought to the last, though exhausted by the enemy's incredible might. At the cost of their lives, the soldiers dealt with the vanguard, but countless more xenos were emerging from the corridors. My heir ordered a retreat, and the sappers collapsed the passage behind us with melta charges to hold back the enemy and win us time.

traits.locale_text: 長い戦いの末、人間たちは敵の圧倒的な力に疲弊しながらも最後まで戦い続けた。命を賭して先鋒を倒した兵士たちだったが、通路から次々と現れる異星人の数に圧倒された。私の後継者は撤退を命じ、爆薬で通路を塞ぎ、敵の進撃を遅らせ、時間稼ぎをした。
